title: Aurora, 99361, PomPom Penguin w/Xmas Tree 8In, Soft Toy, white and grey
features: Meet PomPom Penguin w/Xmas Tree Soft Toy from Aurora's fabulous range of collectable PomPom Penguins. This festive friend is here to spread joy and warmth this holiday season, bringing a touch of Christmas magic to your home.

Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high-quality materials. This grey and white coloured 20cm penguin exudes winter elegance. Its plush fur is irresistibly soft, making every hug a heartwarming experience.

This PomPom Penguin Soft Toy is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hang tags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth. Get ready for a sleigh full of holiday cheer as your penguin pal proudly holds a miniature Christmas tree. With a twinkling star on top and tiny ornaments adorning its branches, this festive touch adds a sprinkle of merriment to any space.
Searching for a unique and memorable gift? Look no further! Our Penguin Soft Toy is the ideal present for friends, family, or anyone who appreciates the joy of cuddles and the magic of Christmas.
description: Product Description Meet your new frosty friend-PomPom Penguin w/Xmas Tree Soft Toy from Aurora's fabulous range of collectable Pom Pom Penguins, crafted with love and care to capture the essence of winter. With its soft, huggable exterior, this penguin is not just a toy; it's a heartwarming experience waiting to be shared. Our adorable 20cm Penguin Plush Toy is a perfect festive companion to add a touch of charm to your holiday season! This grey and white coloured cuddly cutie holding a Christmas tree is here to spread joy and warmth. With a twinkling star on top and tiny ornaments adorning its branches, this festive touch adds a sprinkle of merriment to any space. PomPom Pengiun w/Xmas Tree Soft Toy measures 20cm and this soft toy is suitable from birth. Looking for the perfect gift? Look no further! This Penguin Plush Toy is a thoughtful and heartwarming present for friends, family, or anyone who appreciates the magic of the season. Embrace the spirit of giving with a gift that brings joy and comfort. As a leading industry expert for over 40 years, Aurora World is dedicated to creating innovative and top-quality plush products. Embrace the magic of these charming Penguin soft toys and let your imagination take flight! Hurry and get your Penguin friend today. It's a charming reminder that the most wonderful time of the year is here, and your new pal is ready to celebrate in style. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
